title: Bind runtime/actions to one stack generation and reject polling with pending actions
description: Ensure RplRuntime and actions are bound to a single RplStack instance. Add checks to reject polling if there are pending actions from previous incomplete maintenance.
close_reason: Updated RplRuntime::poll to return Result and reject with PollWithPending error instead of panic, binding actions to single stack/runtime generation via pending state check. Tests in rpl_stack now pass as expected. Committed and pushed.
